problem id: 14917af8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(3)

examples:
  01010101 -> 00001010
  01100010 -> 00001100
  00010101 -> 00000010
  01101001 -> 00001101
  01101110 -> 00001101
  11101100 -> 00011101
  01000001 -> 00001000
  01111101 -> 00001111
  01000110 -> 00001000

query: 10100001
predicted answer: 00010100
